query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.sessionDate, ms.status, ms.mentorName, ms.duration, ms.notes,
       a.name AS alunoName, a.email AS alunoEmail
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Vanessa%Bertholdo%' OR a.name LIKE '%Vanessa%Vargas%'
ORDER BY ms.sessionDate DESC;
